intervention_description: Systematic review and meta-analysis of 50 studies testing loneliness interventions classified into four categories: social skills training, enhanced social support, increased social interaction, and addressing maladaptive social cognition.
intervention_notes: 4-category taxonomy: social skills, social support, social interaction, maladaptive cognition.

intervention_description: 8-week therapist-guided internet-delivered CBT program targeting loneliness via psychoeducation, behavioral experiments, and cognitive restructuring of maladaptive interpersonal cognitions.
